title: The Smiling Senshi
overview: After a failed attack to get back their leader, Yajiro meets Rushuna, who wants to get into the same castle he does.

title: Rushuna Under Attack
overview: Rushuna is mistaken for another Senshi.

title: Enlightened Evil
overview: Rushuna storms Furon's castle to get revenge for Koto.

title: The Town that Does Not Smile
overview: Rushuna and Yajiro arrive at a town run by a ruthless Senshi who forces everyone to pay him and forbids anyone from laughing or smiling.

title: Explosion, Kensousen, Kurenai Touka
overview: Rushuna and Yakiro hide at an inn in the red light district and come under attack by bounty hunters.

title: The Balloonist: Mikan's Revenge
overview: Just as Rushuna straightens things out at the brothel, bandits attack.

title: Destination Tento
overview: Mikan joins Rushuna & Yajiro and they're off to find Tenshi and learn why she put a bounty on Rushuna.

title: An Enemy From The Past, Teppa Azien
overview: Another one of the Joutensen attacks, and this time it's a childhood friend of Rushuna's.

title: When The Wind Flower Dances
overview: While crossing the mountains, Yajiro remembers the last time he came through there and Jester's identity is revealed

title: Entering Tento
overview: The gang arrives in Tento and while Rushuna is having yet another bath, Yajiro sneaks into the castle.

title: Showdown with Tenshi
overview: The reason for all of the attacks on Rushuna is revealed, and Rushuna finally confronts Tenshi.

title: Things Learned on the Road
overview: It's the final showdown: Kaizen vs Yajiro, Rushuna vs Setsuna and Touka & Mikan vs the Army.
